subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. O My Leaf! Bear thou witness unto that which God hath testified [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم یا ورقتی ان اشهدی بما شهد الله و
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
